name: file

outputs.description: The MD5 hash of the file. File.SHA1 The SHA-1 hash of the file.
outputs.name: File.MD5

outputs.description: The SHA-256 hash of the file. File.Malicious.Vendor For malicious files, the vendor that made the decision.
outputs.name: File.SHA256

outputs.description: For malicious files, the reason that the vendor made the decision. DBotScore.Indicator The indicator that was tested.
outputs.name: File.Malicious.Description

outputs.description: The indicator type. DBotScore.Vendor The vendor used to calculate the score.
outputs.name: DBotScore.Type

outputs.description: The actual score. DBotScore.Description The reason for the score (if any).
outputs.name: DBotScore.Score
